column1: # OWASP ZAP rule configuration for the Wonderful Mysterious App baseline scan.
# Format: rule_id TAB action TAB comment
# Actions: IGNORE (never flag), WARN (flag but don't fail), FAIL (fail the build)
# Start conservative (WARN on everything) and tighten as issues are resolved.
# Rules flagged WARN appear in the report but do not fail CI.
# Rules flagged FAIL will break the build if triggered.
# Cookie rules — app has no cookies currently; ignore

Cookie with SameSite Attribute Problem — no cookies in this app

# Info disclosure — fail; these should never appear
